title: Truths to Know Early
description: God is love. Truth does not change. Jesus is the only way to heaven. These are important biblical truths that even young children can learn and understand. Truths to Know Early is an amazing illustrated book that will help you build a strong spiritual foundation for your kids with thirty-four essential truths of the Christian faith as taught in the Scriptures. Knowing these truths from an early age will help children to recognize the devil’s lies, make godly choices, and stand strong in their faith as they grow.

title: Psalms to Know Early
description: The book of Psalms is the Bible’s songbook. These beautiful scriptures speak to feelings that every child knows fear, wonder, comfort, uncertainty, thankfulness. Wouldn t it be great if your young child could know key psalms and be familiar with the content of each one? This lively illustrated book is an excellent resource to help your children know and love the Psalms from an early age.

title: A Light for My Path
description: Help your children fall in love with the Word of God while learning their ABCs. Snuggle up together with this beautifully illustrated book based on one of the most beloved passages in the Bible. A Light for My Path is an alphabet book and so much more. Written to help children develop an abiding love and deep respect for God’s Word, each page is infused with the wonder of Scripture and God’s creation. In addition to illustrating the twenty-six letters of the English alphabet, the book also introduces families to the twenty-two letters of the Hebrew alphabet using the acrostic Psalm 119. This gorgeous 80-page ebook is sure to be treasured for years to come.

title: In the Beginning: The First Seven Days
description: The book of Genesis tells us that in the beginning God created the heavens and the earth. He did it all in six days and then rested on the seventh. Help your children know and understand this important biblical truth with this uniquely illustrated picture book that recounts God’s marvelous, loving work of creation.

title: Good Morning, God
description: This delightful book will introduce your little ones to the simple and wonderful ways they can worship God daily. Deuteronomy 6:6-7 tells us to impress His commands on our children’s hearts and talk about them when we sit at home, when we walk along the road, when we lie down, and when we get up. ‘Good Morning, God’ is a great discipleship tool to help your family do just that. Discussion questions, daily prayers, and activities are included to inspire thoughtfulness and encourage family conversation. Lovingly written and beautifully illustrated by award-winning artist Alice Ratterree, ‘Good Morning, God’ will help your kids fall in love with their heavenly Father by showing them how He can be the focus of everything they do from sunrise to sunset and all through the night. What Parents Are Saying About ‘Good Morning, God’: “My daughter requested that I read it at least a half-dozen times the first day and many, many times since.” “A beautiful addition to any bookshelf in a Christian home and one that will be treasured over and over.”

title: My College Road Map
description: My College Road Map is a unique college admissions guide that stands-out from other college admissions manuals because it is written to and for Christian homeschooled high school and middle school students, not their parents. We believe young people are capable of taking ownership of their education and only need guidance to make intelligent choices that will affect their future.
